name: Tray-Baked Rose Petal Lamb Chops with Chilli & Herbs

ingredients.item:
800g (1lb 12oz) lamb chops or loin
6 tbsp olive oil
5 tbsp dried edible rose petals, finely ground in a spice grinder
1 heaped tsp turmeric
3 tsp ground cumin
3 tsp cumin seeds
1 tsp ground cinnamon
2 heaped tsp crushed sea salt
3 fat garlic cloves, thinly sliced
2 tbsp rosewater
ingredients.original:
800g (1lb 12oz) lamb chops or loin
6 tbsp olive oil
5 tbsp dried edible rose petals, finely ground in a spice grinder
1 heaped tsp turmeric
3 tsp ground cumin
3 tsp cumin seeds
1 tsp ground cinnamon
2 heaped tsp crushed sea salt
3 fat garlic cloves, thinly sliced
2 tbsp rosewater

ingredients.item:
1 large red chilli, deseeded and finely chopped
1 x 20g packet of coriander, leaves picked and finely chopped
2 tsp dried mint
juice of ½ lime
8 tbsp olive oil
sea salt and freshly ground black pepper
ingredients.original:

1 x 20g packet of coriander, leaves picked and finely chopped
